candidates.why: Generic operating depreciation row appears below 'Other operating expenses' and above operating profit, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales/cost of revenues depreciation. No explicit COGS-related D&A row is shown alongside the selected 'Cost of goods sold' bucket.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS/cost of sales D&A row is visible before financial lines. Per the conservative rule, assume D&A is already embedded in the selected 'Cost of goods sold' row unless a separate same-level COGS D&A row is shown.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Clearly a sub-component of the selected parent row 'Research and development expenses', not a separate same-level operating expense to add later. Also R&D is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding R&D D&A separately would risk distortion/double counting.

Clearly a sub-component of the selected parent row 'Research and development expenses', not a separate same-level operating expense to add later. Also R&D is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding R&D D&A separately would risk distortion/double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Appears underneath selected SG&A component rows ('Marketing and distribution expenses' and 'Administrative Expenses') with accompanying balancing-value lines, indicating it is embedded within those selected parent buckets rather than separate from them.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Appears underneath selected SG&A component rows ('Marketing and distribution expenses' and 'Administrative Expenses') with accompanying balancing-value lines, indicating it is embedded within those selected parent buckets rather than separate from them.

Generic operating depreciation row near 'Other operating expenses' lacks clear linkage to selected SG&A component buckets and could overlap with totals; conservative treatment is not to add it separately.

variables.notes: Visible D&A rows are presented as sub-components within already selected XSGA parent rows (R&D, marketing/distribution, administrative). Therefore they should not be added separately. The generic 'Depreciation' row is too ambiguous and not clearly a separate SG&A D&A bucket.
